TRUST_PROXY.description: Trust X-Forwarded-* headers when behind a reverse proxy

DB_HOST.description: PostgreSQL host (split DB config; validated by validateEnv.js)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL connection string (alternative to split DB_* vars)

REDIS_URL.description: Redis connection URL for sessions, cache, and rate limiting

JWT_ACCESS_SECRET.description: Secret for signing short-lived access JWTs

JWT_SECRET.description: Legacy single JWT secret; accepted if JWT_ACCESS_SECRET/JWT_REFRESH_SECRET pair is absent

OTP_HASH_SECRET.description: HMAC secret for hashing OTP codes at rest

MSG91_AUTH_KEY.description: MSG91 API auth key for OTP SMS (required when SMS_PROVIDER is msg91)

MSG91_API_KEY.description: MSG91 API key alias (secret manager mapping)

MSG91_TEMPLATE_ID.description: MSG91 DLT template ID for OTP SMS

MSG91_OTP_TEMPLATE_ID.description: MSG91 OTP template name; falls back to MSG91_TEMPLATE_ID if unset

SMS_PROVIDER.description: SMS backend (msg91, console, etc.); drives OTP env validation

OTP_MAX_ATTEMPTS.description: Maximum OTP verification attempts per session

PHONEPE_MERCHANT_ID.description: [DEPRECATED] PhonePe merchant ID — replaced by Cashfree

PHONEPE_SALT_KEY.description: [DEPRECATED] PhonePe salt key — replaced by CASHFREE_SECRET_KEY

PHONEPE_SALT_INDEX.description: [DEPRECATED] PhonePe salt index — no longer used

PHONEPE_ENVIRONMENT.description: [DEPRECATED] PhonePe API environment — replaced by CASHFREE_API_BASE

CASHFREE_APP_ID.description: Cashfree app ID for payment gateway

CASHFREE_SECRET_KEY.description: Cashfree secret key for API authentication and webhook verification

CASHFREE_API_BASE.description: Cashfree API base URL (sandbox or production)

GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY.description: Google Maps Platform API key; used in both backend and Flutter app

FIREBASE_API_KEY.description: Firebase Web API key; used in backend and Flutter app

FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID.description: Firebase project ID; used in backend and Flutter app

FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID.description: Firebase Cloud Messaging sender ID; used in backend and Flutter app

FIREBASE_VAPID_KEY.description: Firebase VAPID key for web push; required when FIREBASE_API_KEY is set in production

AWS_REGION.description: AWS region for S3, Secrets Manager, and backups

AWS_S3_BUCKET.description: S3 bucket for user uploads and media

AWS_BACKUP_BUCKET.description: S3 bucket for scheduled database backups

SENTRY_DSN.description: Sentry DSN for error reporting; used in backend and Flutter app

ELASTICSEARCH_URL.description: Elasticsearch endpoint for logs and search

CORS_ORIGINS.description: Comma-separated allowed CORS origins; default empty list

CORS_ALLOW_NULL_ORIGIN.description: Allow requests with no Origin header (e.g. mobile, curl)

DEV_AUTH_BYPASS_ENABLED.description: Enable dev-only auth bypass (never enable in production)

DEV_AUTH_BYPASS_SECRET.description: Shared secret for dev auth bypass header

DEFAULT_COUNTRY_CODE.description: Default phone country code for OTP and login

MAX_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS.description: Failed login attempts before account lockout (1–10)

RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS.description: Global rate limit window in milliseconds

RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Max requests per IP per rate limit window

AUTH_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Max auth endpoint requests per window

MAX_FILE_SIZE.description: Maximum upload size in bytes (default 5 MiB)

ALLOWED_FILE_TYPES.description: Comma-separated MIME types; default image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp

BACKUP_SCHEDULE.description: Cron expression for automated DB backups

FCM_SERVER_KEY.description: Legacy FCM server key for push notifications

NOTIFICATION_COOLDOWN_MS.description: Minimum interval between duplicate notifications to the same user

MAX_NOTIFICATIONS_PER_MINUTE.description: Per-user notification rate cap per minute
